name: Static Mimikatz Driver Name Detected
notes:
This rule detects known exploited mimikatz driver names.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Markus Neis, @markus_neis, Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: PrinterNightmare Mimikatz Driver Name
SIGMA Description: Detects static QMS 810 and mimikatz driver name used by Mimikatz as exploited in CVE-2021-1675 and CVE-2021-34527


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows x64\drivers\version-3\qms 810\%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows x64\drivers\version-3\mimikatz%' OR ( LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%legitprinter%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows%' ) OR ( ( LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\currentversion\print\printers%' ) AND ( LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%gentil kiwi%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%mimikatz printer%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%kiwi legit printer%' ) ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Static Mimikatz Driver Name Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows x64\drivers\version-3\qms 810\%'  OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows x64\drivers\version-3\mimikatz%'  OR  ( 	LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%legitprinter%'  	AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments\windows%'  ) OR  ( 	 	( 		LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\control\print\environments%' 		OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\currentversion\print\printers%' 	) 	AND 	( 		LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%gentil kiwi%' 		OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%mimikatz printer%' 		OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%kiwi legit printer%' 	) ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Static Mimikatz Driver Name Detected
Event description: Detects known exploited mimikatz driver names.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
